---
title: "Blog: Learning Notes"
format:
  html:
    title-block-banner: true
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, image]
  image-height: 160px
---


**AUTHOR**
Shuning Zhang

Welcome to my blog page. Here I collect reflections on website building, design, and learning.
